title: Resource Maces
description: Mod that adds Maces made from Resources like: wood, stone, iron, diamonds, netherite.
body:
Have you ever wanted to craft a mace right away when started a new world? Or you just wish your mace was more powerful? With this mod you can craft Maces made from different Materials (like wood, stone) just like other tools, or you can upgrade your Mace to make it more powerful! This mod also adds 6 More Advancements.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a52d7f4649c10aefdfe6a3d6526f8a85599efc9a.png)

>Wooden Mace

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Wooden Mace is an early - game Mace. you can Craft it from Wooden Core, 1 string and 1 stick.

Damage:

 For the first 3 blocks of falling: [1 damage per block]

 For the next 2 blocks of falling: [1 damage per block]

 for falling from a height greater than 5 blocks: [0,33 damage per block]

Crafting Recipe:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61d97e4effbf3b6ca1d85d21617664798dc56c41.png)


</details>

>Gold Mace

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Golden Mace is a shiny good looking Mace but its not very durable and its not dealing a lot of damage. You can craft it from Gold Core, 1 string and 1 stick.


Damage:

 For the first 3 blocks of falling: [1 damage per block]

 For the next 2 blocks of falling: [1 damage per block]

 for falling from a height greater than 5 blocks: [0,33 damage per block]

Crafting Recipe:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8b67726d50ca162accd34ba1725c5bea991add8.png)

</details>

>Stone Mace

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Stone Mace is also an early - game Mace. you can Craft it from Stone Core, 1 string and 1 stick.

Damage:

 For the first 3 blocks of falling: [1.5 damage per block]

 For the next 2 blocks of falling: [1 damage per block]

 for falling from a height greater than 5 blocks: [0,5 damage per block]

Crafting Recipe:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0903bcb81a66b78ca54db231253b980a635ba6e.png)

</details>

>Iron Mace

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Iron Mace is a pretty strong mace, but its weaker than normal mace. you can Craft it from Iron Core, 1 string and 1 stick.

Damage:

 For the first 3 blocks of falling: [2 damage per block]

 For the next 5 blocks of falling: [1 damage per block]

 for falling from a height greater than 8 blocks: [0,75 damage per block]

Crafting Recipe:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ce8f7e5e0ea370e1e413eca844f70b0792229e.png)

</details>
>Diamond Mace

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Diamond Mace is a really powerful mace. to craft it you need to get yourself the original Mace, and upgrade it in smithing table using Diamond Core and a special Smithing Template.


Damage:

 For the first 3 blocks of falling: [4 damage per block]

 For the next 9 blocks of falling: [2 damage per block]

 for falling from a height greater than 12 blocks: [1 damage per block]

Smithing Table Recipe:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0368f190fcb52ad5944ad0976590f415c99d9a04.png)



</details>

>Netherite Mace

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Netherite Mace is the most powerful Mace you can craft with this mod. It deals a lot of damage and when player is falling from more than 10 blocks, it will ignite nearby mobs for 3 seconds. You can get it by upgrading Diamond Mace in the smithing table using Netherite Core and Netherite Upgrade Smithing Template.

  

Damage:

 For the first 3 blocks of falling: [5 damage per block]

 For the next 12 blocks of falling: [2 damage per block]

 for falling from a height greater than 15 blocks: [1 damage per block]

Smithing Table Recipe:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f385fe69c9af0042b2474144bff97bbdd84a513.png)

</details>
